releaseNotes: v0.24.20 — hardening pass round 3. Eight audit findings landed: decrement+pull race produces matching audit-log narrative across devices (DSCSA-relevant); Lamport clock clamps to max(observed)+1 on every inbound pull; outbound-queue write failures now surface on the Sync Health tile instead of being silently dropped; CSV audit-log export streams to disk in batches so it can't OOM on a long retention window; the in-app update check honestly reports 'manifest unreachable' instead of lying 'you're on the latest'; latest.json gained a recalledVersions list so we can pull customers back from a bad build; audit log retention bumped from 2 years to 7 years to match DSCSA pedigree requirements. Server-side: /start-trial now per-IP rate-limited (5/hour by default) before paid ads go live. Deferred to a future release: scan + cycle-count-deplete race (need clearer repro), dashboard re-render perf at 5K+ bottles (1-2 day refactor).
